positive: Minimalist stylized depiction of a cosmic mountain range under a nebula sky, composed of clean, overlapping geometric forms. The mountains should have a distinct, stylized silhouette using deep indigo, royal purple, and accented with bright cyan and turquoise crystalline veins. The nebula background features soft gradients of midnight blue and violet, contrasting sharply with the crisp, defined edges of the foreground mountains. The style is inspired by modern abstract art and nature illustrations, with perfect symmetry and central focus. High contrast, vaporwave aesthetic, vector art quality, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel.
